headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on DTE Energy, Lowers Price Target to $152
summary: BMO Capital  analyst James Thalacker   maintains DTE Energy (NYSE:DTE) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $154 to $152.
